summary: Frontend-only re-verification of pick-variety fix in Home.jsx runShuffle. ZIP 10001, 9 sequential deals. Bug (always landing on same sponsor 'the deli') is FIXED. No-repeat guard fully working. Group mode & favorites regressions pass.

pick_variety_results.verdict: PARTIAL PASS — never lands on the same spot twice in a row (no-repeat guard works), and rotates across multiple spots (bug fixed). However only 3 distinct names appeared across 9 deals (target was 4+). Root cause: openPool for ZIP 10001 at test time had exactly 3 open spots, so the >=3 open threshold selected varietyPool=openPool (size 3) and cycled among them. This is by-design per the applied fix. If E1 wants stricter variety, raise threshold (e.g. >=5) or always sample from full pool with a mild open-bias.

favorites_regression.notes: Clicking heart on result card added 'Chelsea Square Diner' to Favorites drawer; header shows count 1. e.stopPropagation/preventDefault fix from iter28 confirmed working (photo link did NOT open).

shuffle_popup_regression.clicks_absorbed_during_flash: not observed as blocker — flashHit pointer-events:none fix from iter28 in place; respin clicks after ~2.7s always worked.

action_items: OPTIONAL: In ZIPs where only 3 spots are open, variety is limited to those 3 (target was 4+). Consider raising open-threshold to >=5 OR always sample from full pool while lightly biasing to open spots (e.g. weighted sampling). Not a bug — the original 'always same spot' issue is definitively fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx runShuffle group-mode loop iterates over candidates.length but always calls pick(seen) which may return same item repeatedly (loop guards with seen.has check but wastes iterations). Minor; works.
Home.jsx is 1146 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; consider extracting RevealStage, ShufflingDeck, buildFateCard into separate modules.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pick-variety fix in Home.jsx runShuffle verified via 9 sequential deals at ZIP 10001. Result names: Chelsea Square Diner, Roma Pizza, Taco Bell Cantina (rotating, no back-to-back repeats). Bug from PRD ('every deal lands on the deli sponsor') is fixed. Group mode deals 3 distinct candidates; lock-in flow works. Favorites toggle on result card persists to drawer (iter28 e.stopPropagation fix verified). If future runs want more variety, note that ZIP 10001 openPool size at that hour was ~3.
